content.text: {"is_legal":true,"action_type":"persuasion","summary":"The goblins reject Talia's plea and move to fight.","reasoning_summary":"The request is plausible, but the check fails against aggressive goblins.","roll_requests":[{"owner":"player","visibility":"public","expression":"1d20+2","purpose":"Persuasion check"}],"state_effects":[{"effect_type":"append_public_event","target":"encounter:goblin-camp","value":"The goblins reject Talia's plea and move to fight."},{"effect_type":"append_public_event","target":"encounter:goblin-camp","value":"Initiative: Talia 9, Goblin Scout 16."},{"effect_type":"set_phase","target":"encounter:goblin-camp","value":"combat"},{"effect_type":"set_encounter_outcome","target":"encounter:goblin-camp","value":"combat"}],"rule_references":[]}
